brand.name: CiviTech Global
brand.tagline: Developing creative, innovative software solutions to help and facilitate civilization.
brand.shortTagline: Building the future of civic technology.
brand.mission: Our goal is to help human civilization dive deeper into technology every day, until we become a fully intellectual species. We do this through open-source projects and global community collaboration.

hero.headline: CiviTech Global
hero.subheadline: Meet the teams, roles, and career paths that power our mission.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe technology should lift civilization forward. Through open-source collaboration and community-driven development, we build software that matters while creating pathways for juniors and career-changers to gain real-world experience.

teams.title: Meet the Teams
teams.description: Read the story behind each team and discover how we work together.

roles.title: Explore Roles
roles.description: Browse every role, filter by team, and see detailed career roadmaps.

openCall.title: Open Call
openCall.description: Join us as a part-time volunteer contributor and build world-class software.

gitWorkflow.title: Git Workflow
gitWorkflow.description: Learn how we fork, branch, commit, push, and merge across our projects.

cta.title: Ready to contribute?
cta.description: Whether you are starting out or leveling up, there is a place for you at Civitech Global.

teams.title: Our Teams
teams.subtitle: Five cross-functional teams working together to turn ambitious ideas into reliable software.

roles.title: All Roles
roles.subtitle: Browse every role across Civitech Global.
